message:
fix(codegen): Fix variable declaration/reference naming consistency

- Skip Warning base classes in __bases_vtables__ (like Error classes)
- Use writeLocalVarName for param mutable copy declarations (copy -> copy_)
- Fix __new__ first param discard to skip by index instead of name
- Use isNameUsedInNewForInit in discard loop to match signature logic

Reduces undeclared identifier errors from 21 to 19.
